notes: Use this profile for enterprise commercial tenants.

testUsers.note: Graph user and group automation available.

dlp.note: Purview DLP policy and rule automation supported.

retention.note: Retention policy and rule automation supported.

eDiscovery.note: Case, hold, and search automation supported.

communicationCompliance.note: Communication Compliance / DSPM for AI commands expected in commercial tenants.

sentinelIntegration.note: Microsoft Sentinel workspace + Purview data connector lab (ARM-based, requires an Azure subscription in the same tenant).
